People Backed InternetPeople Backed Internet

Tapping into devices' idle computational energy around the world to fuel a trust-native internet

Start Building

Documentation
Documentation
Scroll to explore

LayerEdge sets People as the foundation for the new Internet

Trusted by 1M+ Light Client Users

LayerEdge transforms ordinary devices into zk-verifiers — creating the world’s first people-powered verification layer.

Aggregated zk proof

Proof Aggregation

People's Network

LayerEdge finalizes aggregated zk-proofs by anchoring them to various L1s — ensuring verifiable, immutable integrity backed by millions of users.

Trust is the foundation of human coordination, and mathematical certainty is its purest form.

We're building a universal verification layer that secures state transitions through a decentralized, cryptographically secure network.

By enabling millions of validators to verify proofs across systems, we democratize access to verifiable truth for AI, finance, and digital ecosystems.

Build the new Internet
Build the new Internet

Lifecycle of a Proof on the LayerEdge Network

  • Processing ZKPs

    Protocols uses simple LayerEdge SDK to integrate and automatically send their zk proofs to the LayerEdge Network.

  • Aggregation

    These proofs are then recusively aggregated & verified on leaf-level.

  • Verification

    Aggregated proofs are then verified by millions of light node verifiers.

Role of a
LayerEdge Node

Validator keeps the integrity of the aggregation and leaf-level verification modules intact and receives rewards in return.

Light Node

Without having to stake and by simply using their devices' idle computational energy, users can randomly verify proofs on leaf-level and receive rewards.

Full Node

By running a full node and staking LayerEdge Token, a full node validator can verify complex proofs to receive rewards.
Contribute to LayerEdge Network
Contribute to LayerEdge Network
